title: Notices and advisories: hazardous wastes or recyclables - Canada.ca
content:
## Notices and advisories: hazardous wastes or recyclables
Temporary measures in processing permit requests to move hazardous wastes or recyclables (January 2018)
Civil Aviation Safety Alert (CASA) No. 2016-04:  Transportation of lithium ion or lithium metal batteries as cargo on aircraft (5 April 2016)
Protective direction no.35 (22 March 2016)
RDIMS # 10277515:  Did you know that lithium batteries are dangerous goods? (March 2016)
Advisory note regarding movement documents (9 December 2015)
Advisory note on changes in US regulations for spent lead-acid batteries (7 July 2010)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
